mapper.select: select count(1) from problems where status <> -1
select count(1) from submissions where judge_status in ('PENDING','JUDGING')

select count(1) from submissions where submitted_at >= now() - interval 24 hour and judge_status in ('WRONG_ANSWER','COMPILE_ERROR','RUNTIME_ERROR','TIME_LIMIT_EXCEEDED','MEMORY_LIMIT_EXCEEDED','SYSTEM_ERROR')
select count(1) from recommendation_records where recommended_at >= now() - interval 24 hour
